title: PHP Developer - BackEnd (Remote)
description: Role: PHP Developer - BackEnd (Remote) Location: Remote (Work from Anywhere) Job Type: Contract Payout: $30 - $110/hour Role Overview: We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a PHP Back End Developer to work on a contract basis implementing and maintaining core backend services for high-traffic web applications. The role involves developing and optimizing server-side logic to ensure scalability and performance of applications handling significant user interaction. Key Responsibilities: • Develop and maintain PHP-based backend services and APIs to support web application functionality. • Optimize existing codebase for performance, security, and scalability. • Collaborate with frontend developers to integrate user-facing elements with server-side logic. • Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented PHP code following industry best practices. • Debug and troubleshoot issues across the application stack, including database queries and API endpoints. Required Skills & Qualifications: • Minimum 3 years of experience in PHP development with strong proficiency in PHP 7.x or 8.x. • Experience with PHP frameworks such as Laravel, Symfony, or CodeIgniter. • Proficiency in MySQL or PostgreSQL database design and optimization. • Experience with RESTful API development and integration. • Familiarity with version control systems, preferably Git. • Knowledge of server environments (Linux/Unix) and deployment workflows. • Experience with caching mechanisms (Redis, Memcached) and background job processing. • Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently in a remote setting. More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Technology, Information and Internet industry, contributing to the development of scalable backend systems powering a widely used platform. The position requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions. Equal Opportunity Employer: We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications. Apply Now!

title: Software Craftsperson/Node.js/React.js/AI
description: This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Software Craftsperson (Node.js/React.js/AI) based in Turkey. This is a remote opportunity for a software engineer who is passionate about building high-quality, scalable, and maintainable systems. You will work in an AI-native development environment where modern tools enhance engineering practices without compromising craftsmanship. The role focuses on full-stack ownership, continuous improvement, and delivering meaningful solutions for diverse projects. You will collaborate closely with talented engineers, contribute to technical decisions, and work with a strong product mindset. The environment encourages autonomy, experimentation, and mastery of software development practices. If you enjoy solving complex problems, improving systems, and raising engineering standards, this role offers an opportunity to make a real impact. Accountabilities As a Software Craftsperson, you will take ownership of designing, developing, and improving production systems while following strong engineering principles. You will contribute across the full software development lifecycle, from understanding user needs to delivering reliable solutions. Build and maintain scalable full-stack applications using modern technologies, including Node.js, React.js, and AI-powered development tools. Apply software craftsmanship practices such as test-driven development, clean code principles, refactoring, and continuous delivery. Take end-to-end ownership of features, including front-end development, back-end services, infrastructure, and deployment processes. Collaborate through pair programming, peer reviews, and proactive teamwork to continuously improve engineering quality. Work closely with product teams to understand problems, define solutions, and deliver impactful features and improvements. Participate in an environment focused on continuous learning, experimentation, and raising technical standards. Contribute to a culture of ownership, feedback, collaboration, and delivering measurable outcomes. Requirements You are an experienced individual contributor who thrives in an ownership-driven environment and enjoys solving complex technical challenges with autonomy. You combine strong engineering fundamentals with a passion for product thinking and continuous improvement. 1.5+ years of full-stack software development experience with hands-on experience building and maintaining production systems. Strong expertise in Node.js, React.js, and AI-related development practices. Solid understanding of object-oriented programming, data structures, algorithms, and software engineering methodologies. Experience working with Agile and Extreme Programming (XP) practices in a continuous deployment environment. Familiarity with test-driven development, CI/CD tools, web frameworks, relational databases, and performance optimization. Working knowledge of server configuration, deployment infrastructure, source control, and bug tracking systems. Ability to write technical documentation, define problems independently, and communicate effectively. Strong sense of ownership, curiosity, and commitment to engineering excellence. Product mindset with the ability to understand customer needs and contribute beyond assigned tasks. Comfortable working remotely and collaborating effectively within Pacific Standard Time working hours. Benefits Fully remote working environment with structured flexibility and collaborative team rhythms. Opportunities to work on challenging projects while using AI as a development partner. Twice-yearly in-person co-working sprints with travel expenses covered. Annual company retreat with travel expenses covered. Dedicated learning and development budget to support continuous growth. Conference participation and speaking opportunities sponsorship. Comprehensive medical and term insurance coverage. Employee-friendly leave policies. Home office support fund. How Jobgether Works We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team. We appreciate your interest and wish you the best! Why Apply Through Jobgether? Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: Foral Dijital Pozisyon Özeti Foral Dijital bünyesinde çalışacak, web tabanlı yazılım projelerimizin geliştirilmesinde görev alacak bir Full-Stack Web Geliştirici arıyoruz. Aradığımız kişi, Laravel tabanlı sistemlerimizin hem arka uç (backend) hem de ön uç (frontend) tarafında geliştirme yapacak, mevcut projeleri iyileştirecek ve yeni özellikler kazandıracaktır. Bu rolde başarılı olacak kişi; temiz ve sürdürülebilir kod yazan, canlı bir üretim sistemine dikkat ve sorumlulukla dokunan, problem çözmeye istekli biridir. Küçük ve dinamik bir ekipte çalışacağınız için, geliştirdiğiniz çözümler doğrudan sahaya yansıyacak; bu da hem sorumluluk hem de gerçek bir etki yaratma fırsatı sunacaktır. Şirketimizin büyüme yolculuğunda teknik altyapının şekillenmesinde aktif rol oynayacaksınız. Sorumluluklar Laravel (PHP) tabanlı web uygulamalarının backend ve frontend tarafında yeni özellikler geliştirmek ve mevcut sistemleri iyileştirmek Çok kiracılı (multi-tenant) mimaride veri güvenliğini ve izolasyonunu gözeterek veritabanı sorguları ve iş mantığı geliştirmek Blade, Alpine.js ve Tailwind CSS kullanarak kullanıcı arayüzleri tasarlamak ve hayata geçirmek Kod değişikliklerini test etmek, yedeklemek ve canlı ortama güvenli biçimde aktarmak; sistem kararlılığını korumak Ortaya çıkan hataları tespit etmek, kök nedenini analiz etmek ve kalıcı çözümler üretmek Sunucu (Linux/nginx) ve veritabanı (MySQL) tarafında temel yapılandırma, izleme ve sorun giderme işlemlerine destek olmak Versiyon kontrolü, test ve deployment süreçleri gibi geliştirme pratiklerinin iyileştirilmesine katkı sunmak Nitelikler PHP ve Laravel framework konusunda uygulamalı deneyim (MVC yapısı, Eloquent ORM, middleware ve routing kavramlarına hakimiyet) MySQL veya benzeri ilişkisel veritabanlarında sorgu yazma, ilişki kurma ve migration yönetimi deneyimi Blade template motoru, Alpine.js ve Tailwind CSS ile frontend geliştirme becerisi Git ile versiyon kontrolü konusunda bilgi sahibi olmak Temiz, okunabilir ve sürdürülebilir kod yazma alışkanlığı Canlı üretim sistemlerinde dikkatli ve sorumlu çalışma bilinci (yedekleme, test etme, kontrollü yayınlama) Problem çözme odaklı yaklaşım ve analitik düşünme becerisi Yazılı ve sözlü iletişim becerilerine sahip olmak, ekip içinde uyumlu çalışabilmek Tercihen (artı puan): Linux sunucu yönetimi (Ubuntu, nginx, PHP-FPM) ve SSH kullanımı konusunda deneyim Cloudflare, DNS ve önbellek (cache) yönetimi bilgisi Web güvenliği konularında farkındalık (CSRF, SQL injection, güvenli dosya yükleme, veri izolasyonu) API entegrasyonu ve webhook deneyimi Bilgisayar/Yazılım Mühendisliği veya ilgili bölümlerden mezuniyet ya da eşdeğer pratik deneyim

title: Senior Backend Software Engineer (.NET)
description: ## Who We Are We don't just develop software; we build scalable products. We develop Multi-Tenant SaaS infrastructures, microservices architectures, event-driven systems, and high-traffic integration platforms. Our products support a broad ecosystem consisting of e-commerce, payment systems, subscription management, customer engagement, notification infrastructures, and services tailored for various industries. We are looking for a *Senior Backend Software Engineer* to join a team where code quality, software architecture, and sustainable system design are highly valued, and where technical decisions are truly made by engineers. --- # Job Description In this role, you will take an active part in processes such as: •⁠ ⁠Developing microservices-based backend services. •⁠ ⁠Architecture-level improvement of both new and existing services. •⁠ ⁠Designing and developing event-driven systems. •⁠ ⁠Developing third-party system integrations. •⁠ ⁠Creating solutions focused on performance, security, and scalability. •⁠ ⁠Conducting code reviews. •⁠ ⁠Contributing to technical design processes. •⁠ ⁠Establishing and implementing software standards. •⁠ ⁠Providing technical mentorship to Junior and Mid-level developers. --- # Technical Skills Required ### Advanced Level •⁠ ⁠C# •⁠ ⁠.NET •⁠ ⁠ASP.NET Core •⁠ ⁠REST API development •⁠ ⁠Microservices Architecture •⁠ ⁠Clean Architecture •⁠ ⁠SOLID Principles •⁠ ⁠Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) •⁠ ⁠Design Patterns •⁠ ⁠Dependency Injection •⁠ ⁠CQRS •⁠ ⁠MediatR or similar architectures •⁠ ⁠Event-Driven Architecture •⁠ ⁠Asynchronous Programming •⁠ ⁠JWT Authentication & Authorization •⁠ ⁠Docker •⁠ ⁠Git --- ### Intermediate to Advanced Level •⁠ ⁠Redis •⁠ ⁠Message Brokers (Kafka, RabbitMQ, etc.) •⁠ ⁠Distributed Cache •⁠ ⁠Distributed Lock •⁠ ⁠Background Worker services •⁠ ⁠Scheduler systems •⁠ ⁠API Gateway •⁠ ⁠Swagger / OpenAPI •⁠ ⁠Elasticsearch •⁠ ⁠Kubernetes •⁠ ⁠CI/CD processes --- ### Database Knowledge We expect strong experience in at least one of the following technologies: •⁠ ⁠SQL Server •⁠ ⁠PostgreSQL •⁠ ⁠MongoDB Additionally, the following are highly valued: •⁠ ⁠Writing high-performance queries •⁠ ⁠Indexing structures •⁠ ⁠Transaction management •⁠ ⁠Data modeling •⁠ ⁠Experience working with Big Data --- # Software Engineering Expectations We expect you to be experienced in the following areas: •⁠ ⁠Clean Code •⁠ ⁠SOLID •⁠ ⁠Refactoring •⁠ ⁠Domain-Driven Design (DDD) approach •⁠ ⁠Testable software development •⁠ ⁠Code readability •⁠ ⁠Performance optimization •⁠ ⁠Security-oriented development •⁠ ⁠Logging •⁠ ⁠Monitoring •⁠ ⁠Error Handling •⁠ ⁠High Availability •⁠ ⁠Scalability --- # What Will Make You Stand Out •⁠ ⁠Experience working on Multi-Tenant SaaS projects. •⁠ ⁠Experience developing large-scale microservices architectures. •⁠ ⁠Experience developing Event-Driven systems. •⁠ ⁠Experience developing financial systems. •⁠ ⁠Payment gateway integrations. •⁠ ⁠E-commerce systems. •⁠ ⁠ERP integrations. •⁠ ⁠Marketplace integrations. •⁠ ⁠Real-time, high-traffic systems. •⁠ ⁠Production experience in a Kubernetes environment. •⁠ ⁠Cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, or GCP). --- # What We Expect From You •⁠ ⁠A level of software expertise sufficient to make architectural and technical decisions. •⁠ ⁠High problem-solving skills. •⁠ ⁠A strong interest in software architecture. •⁠ ⁠Accountability and ownership. •⁠ ⁠Strong aptitude for teamwork. •⁠ ⁠Openness to continuous learning and research. •⁠ ⁠Ability to manage technical debt. •⁠ ⁠A product-oriented mindset. --- # What Awaits You Here? •⁠ ⁠A modern technology stack. •⁠ ⁠Microservices architecture. •⁠ ⁠Event-driven systems. •⁠ ⁠Large-scale backend development. •⁠ ⁠Direct participation in technical decision-making processes. •⁠ ⁠A say in architectural design processes. •⁠ ⁠Opportunities to work on continuously evolving products. •⁠ ⁠A technical team composed of highly experienced engineers. •⁠ ⁠A development culture that prioritizes code quality. •⁠ ⁠A working environment where you can experiment with new technologies. --- # Technology Stack •⁠ ⁠.NET •⁠ ⁠C# •⁠ ⁠ASP.NET Core •⁠ ⁠Docker •⁠ ⁠Kubernetes •⁠ ⁠Redis •⁠ ⁠Kafka •⁠ ⁠MongoDB •⁠ ⁠SQL Server / PostgreSQL •⁠ ⁠Elasticsearch •⁠ ⁠GitHub Actions •⁠ ⁠REST API •⁠ ⁠JWT •⁠ ⁠Swagger •⁠ ⁠OpenAPI --- ## How to Apply If you are a Backend Software Engineer who does not just build APIs, but also: •⁠ ⁠designs systems, •⁠ ⁠makes architectural decisions, •⁠ ⁠develops scalable software, •⁠ ⁠prioritizes writing high-quality code, •⁠ ⁠and strives for continuous technical self-improvement, ...then we would love to see you on our team!

title: Senior Software Developer (Full-Stack / .NET Core & Vue.js)
description: Hakkımızda Hipposoft olarak, Türkiye'nin önde gelen B2B e-ticaret ve dijital iş yeri platformlarını modern teknolojilerle sıfırdan inşa ediyor ve ölçeklendiriyoruz. Bünyemizde geliştirdiğimiz yüksek trafikli e-ticaret altyapılarımız, mikroservis mimarilerimiz, depo yönetim (WMS) ve filo takip (Filo) sistemlerimizle her gün on binlerce kullanıcıya kesintisiz hizmet veriyoruz. Büyüyen mühendislik ekibimizde, ağırlıklı olarak Backend (.NET Core & Mikroservis) mimarilerimizde sorumluluk alacak, ancak ihtiyaç duyulduğunda Frontend (Vue.js 3 / Nuxt.js) tarafında da elini taşın altına koymaktan çekinmeyecek, e-ticaret dinamiklerine hakim bir Senior Software Developer arıyoruz. Rol ve Sorumluluklar Azure üzerinde çalışan, .NET Core 8 tabanlı, mikroservis odaklı e-ticaret mimarimizin geliştirilmesinde ve optimize edilmesinde aktif rol oynamak. Ağırlıklı olarak güçlü ve güvenli API'ler, entegrasyonlar ve servisler geliştirirken; gerektiğinde Vue.js 3 ve Nuxt.js kullanarak kullanıcı arayüzü süreçlerine (Storefront & Admin Panelleri) doğrudan katkı sağlamak. Ödeme geçitleri kargo entegrasyonları, ERP sistemleri GİB fatura süreçleri ve İYS entegrasyonlarını yönetmek ve yeni akışlar kurgulamak. SQL/NoSQL veri tabanlarını optimize etmek, Redis mimarisi ile önbelleğe alma stratejileri uygulamak ve Elasticsearch/Algolia ile arama algoritmalarını iyileştirmek. Mikroservisler arasındaki iletişimi RabbitMQ, MassTransit ve Azure Service Bus kullanarak tasarlamak ve sürdürmek. Mevcut .NET Framework / ASP.NET MVC tabanlı sistemlerimizin idamesini sağlamak ve bunları modern mikroservis mimarisine geçiş planlarına dahil etmek. Ekip liderleri ve diğer yazılım geliştiricilerle yakın çalışarak kod kalitesini, mimari standartları ve CI/CD süreçlerini (Azure DevOps) yukarı taşımak. Aradığımız Nitelikler Yazılım geliştirme alanında en az 8 yıl profesyonel deneyim (özellikle yüksek trafikli e-ticaret platformlarında çalışmış olmak büyük bir artıdır). C#, .NET Core 8 ve mikroservis mimarileri konusunda ileri düzeyde uzmanlık (WCF tecrübesi de olan). Vue.js 3, Nuxt.js ve modern JavaScript/TypeScript ekosistemine hakimiyet. Azure SQL (MS SQL) optimizasyonu, veri maskeleme (KVKK/GDPR) süreçleri ve Elasticsearch / MongoDB tecrübesi. RabbitMQ ve MassTransit ile asenkron mimari tasarlama deneyimi. Azure Container Apps, Azure App Service, Docker, Azure DevOps CI/CD boru hatları ve Cloudflare yönetimi konularına aşinalık. Sentry, Graylog, Grafana ve Azure Application Insights gibi izleme araçlarıyla hata analizi ve performans takibi yapabilme yeteneği. Karmaşık iş kurallarını (kampanya kurguları, sepet hesaplamaları, stok yönetimi) hızlıca analiz edip temiz ve sürdürülebilir koda dönüştürebilme becerisi. Sana Ne Sunuyoruz? En modern yapay zeka destekli geliştirme araçlarını (Cursor, Lovable, Claude Code vb.) aktif kullandığımız, yenilikçi bir teknoloji vizyonu. Karmaşık B2B e-ticaret, depo ve lojistik lojiklerini çözebileceğin, teknik olarak seni sürekli canlı tutacak dinamik projeler. Güçlü ekip ruhu, şeffaf süreçler ve sürekli öğrenmeyi destekleyen çalışma ortamı.
